Our Story

About S & D & T Enterprises

Over 50 years of manufacturing quality display cases from Manchester, Ohio.

Home › About Us
Our Story

Manchester, Ohio's
Display Case Manufacturer

S & D & T Enterprises, INC. has been producing quality display cases for collectors since the 1970s. From a small operation in Manchester, Ohio, we grew to operate three specialized divisions serving collectors, dealers, and hobbyists nationwide.

Our three divisions each focus on a specific product category, allowing us to deliver specialized quality rather than mass-produced mediocrity. Every case that leaves our facility meets the standard that has earned the trust of collectors for over five decades.

50+
Years in Business
3
Divisions
100%
USA Made
4
Product Lines
Our Divisions

Three Specialized Manufacturing Divisions

Hardwood Division

Handcrafts our premium wooden display cases from solid cherry, walnut, and oak. Every case is built and finished in-house.

Allstate Manufacturing Co.

Manufactures anodized aluminum display cases built for portability. Ideal for coin shows, gun shows, and collector events.

Ruddles Mills Products

Produces riker-type chipboard display cases and lucite stands used by collectors and dealers across the country.

Have Questions?

We are happy to discuss our products, manufacturing, and ordering process.

Ohio's premier manufacturer of quality display cases for collectors. Handcrafted in Manchester, Ohio since the 1970s.
